feed.title: Cross County Public Library — Digital Collections

entry.title: New collection: Rosewood School Photographs, 1948-1965
entry.summary: Over 300 photographs from the Rosewood School yearbooks and community events, donated by alumni families and now available for public research.

entry.title: Digitization grant awarded for county newspaper microfilm, 1901-1960
entry.summary: The library will digitize six decades of the county's Black-owned weekly newspaper with support from a state preservation grant.
